title: Business Analyst / Consultant
description:
Sustainability that means business

Who We Are

Sustainability software specialist, AMCS, is headquartered in Ireland, with offices in Europe, the USA, and Australasia. With over 1,300 highly-skilled employees across 22 countries, we specialize in delivering technology solutions to facilitate a carbon neutral future.

What We Do

Our innovative SaaS solutions increase efficiency and boost sustainability in resource-intensive industries. Over 5,000 customers across 23 countries already benefit from our Performance Sustainability software, ensuring we deliver practical solutions for improved profitability and environmental resilience across the globe.

Our people

AMCS offers team members more than just a job, but an opportunity to map out a career with a company that is growing, evolving and setting out new ways of working that are having a positive impact on the world around us. AMCS was established in Ireland and holds onto those local roots and ‘start-up’ mentality with a culture of connection. Connection to our work, our customers, our colleagues and our community that creates a working environment that fosters openness, collaboration and creativity.

The Business Analyst will be part of the Professional Services team, working to scope and deliver

solutions to our existing and future customer base for all our software products which includes,

mobile computing and communication software, back-office software solutions and hosted

environments. The Business Analyst will be a product expert capable of leading the customer to

leverage the best business practices in the industry.

Responsibilities Will Include


 * Gain excellent understanding of the business issues and data challenges and industry.
 * Be expert in the use of the AMCS product and its configuration within the industry.
 * Work with specific project teams and with Product Manager(s) to capture requirements and
   
   

develop specifications for both specific project deployments and roadmap development.


 * Review and edit requirements, specifications, business processes and recommendations
   
   

related to proposed solutions at customer sites.


 * Document functional specifications and system design specifications both for commonly
   
   

identified requirements and for specific client engagements.


 * Analyse client organization process against best in class, identify strengths and weaknesses
   
   

and suggest areas of improvement.


 * Work with client personnel to identify required changes.
 * Communicate needed changes to development team.
 * Consistently deliver high-quality services to our clients.
 * Lead client meetings as a subject matter expert.
 * Provide regular reporting to applicable managers, executive team, and the client as required.
 * Actively participate in resolution of issues and conflicts, internally as well as with clients and
   
   

other vendors where appropriate.


 * Engage in scoping and requirements gathering for new and existing projects as necessary.
 * Have strong IT skills.
 * Be able to understand customer requirements and relate these back to the project delivery
   
   

team or software development team where appropriate.


 * Working with systems using Microsoft Message Queues (MSMQ) and managing web applications hosted on IIS (Internet Information Services) as well as developing and deploying on-premises solutions and Azure-based applications
   
   

Desired Skills And Experience


 * 5 years + of work experience preferably in software industry
 * 2 years + minimum experience in a similar role
 * Customer facing experience - taking meetings with customers, providing input to resolve any
   
   

issues, and driving any actions to completion.


 * Excellent communication skills (both written and verbal), especially with regards to providing
   
   

information to clients.


 * Quick to learn ERP systems.
 * A good knowledge of software engineering principles.
 * Excellent Analytical and Problem-Solving skills
 * Delivery of hosted ERP systems
 * Experience in working with C# applications in Visual Studio using the .NET Framework to develop and maintain software solutions
 * Experience in working with REST and SOAP APIs for data integration and communication

title: Business Analyst (Purchasing Platform) (m/w/d)
description:
Vienna, Wels (AT), Würzburg (DE)

Immediate start | Full-time

Welcome to XXXLdigital, where digital innovation meets real-world impact. As the digital unit of the XXXL Group, we are dedicated to all things e-commerce and stationary trade. We develop software solutions for one of Europe's leading furniture retailers. Curating products for the online shops, optimising the customer experience, and handling digital marketing are also part of our core business. We focus on customer needs and providing a seamless omni-channel shopping experience. Our vision is to be the market-leading Home & Living retailer with both our online shops and our stores. At XXXLdigital we value authenticity and diversity. We offer a supportive environment where you can truly thrive and use your potential fully.

That’s You


 * Completed studies in the field of IT or business administration.
 * At least 2 -3 years of professional experience as a business analyst, requirements engineer, project manager or a similar position.
 * Experience in the field of purchasing and product sourcing, product management, product data management, supplier-management is a plus.
 * Ability to work with a wide range of stakeholders, translating complex business needs into clear IT requirements and aligning these with broader strategic goals.
 * Knowledge of project management tools and Agile methodologies, such as Jira and Confluence.
 * A solution-oriented and team player attitude, with strong communication skills.
 * Passion for listening, understanding, and questioning.
 * A high level of German and English.
   
   

That’s Your Daily Business


 * You will gather and analyze user feedback and business requirements, to assist in product development decisions and ensure that the product meets the needs of the target market.
 * You will focus on reporting risks and creating functional and higher-level technical specifications for software development, testing and implementation projects.
 * On a continuous basis, you will evaluate and improve, harmonize and automate business processes to ensure that they are efficient, while understanding and identifying interdependencies.
 * You will take charge of managing vendor and stakeholder relationships, while either supporting or leading contract negotiations, defining SLAs based on business requirements, approving purchase orders and reviewing invoices.
 * You will keep track of industry trends and new technologies and make recommendations for their adoption where appropriate.
 * You will organize and moderate meetings, workshops and required training sessions.
   
   

That Awaits You


 * Health & Well-being: Free coffee, tea, drinks, fresh fruits & vegetables, plus discounted meals at the canteen or lunch allowances (location-based). Modern workspaces designed for all needs.
   
   

Culture & Growth: We value self-responsibility, flat hierarchies, and open feedback. Experience a vibrant team spirit where support and collaboration thrive. Enjoy 2 learning days per quarter, an internal learning campus, and external development opportunities.

Flexible Work-Life Balance: Enjoy flexible working hours and extended remote work options.

Celebrations & Milestones: Team events and special recognition for birthdays and work anniversaries.

Location-Based Benefits: Tailored perks designed to suit the needs of the respective location.

About XXXLdigital

We don't shy away from diversity – we celebrate it. Be yourself and show us who you are!

In Austria, we are legally obliged to disclose the minimum salary according to the collective labour agreement in trade. This is per year 34.594,00 €. However, we offer a higher salary in accordance with your experience and qualifications. We're happy to discuss everything else on that in person.

Let’s excite together!

Interesse? Allen freut sich auf deine Bewerbung:

title: Product Manager - Marketplace & Catalog Experience (m/f/d)
description:
Team

Join Raisin’s Deposits Tribe as a Product Manager focused on how customers discover, compare, and open savings products through our marketplace.

You’ll lead our catalog and funnel experience. How deposit products are configured by partner banks, and how they’re presented and ordered across our B2C, mobile, and B2B channels.

The role sits at the intersection of product presentation and user growth. You’ll work to increase visibility, clarity, and conversion across the full journey: from browsing to successful deposit orders. If you’ve built product discovery, checkout flows, or dynamic content tools, you’ll bring a lot to the table.

You’ll report to the Head of Product for Deposits and work closely with engineering, design, operations, and commercial teams to scale a core area of our platform.

Your Responsibilities


 * Product at Raisin requires a broad set of soft and hard skills. While every day is different we see the following as a useful guide as to what to expect
 * You will be the go-to expert for your product and know how company-level business results are influenced by your product.
 * You will lead the iterative refinement of major customer- or business- product problems in your product. You express clearly their value and success criteria, and you call out risks, dependencies and assumptions to qualify. You exhibit accountability for outcomes, not just output.
 * You will foster the habit of working with data, and you improve the availability of data.
 * You will help to illuminate the (collective best guesses for) the most valuable and feasible path for the next 12 months. You get buy-in and inspire your colleagues to help realise it.
 * You will author and make transparent quarterly OKRs and plans with your Engineering lead which have clear value and connection to strategy, ambition and realism, and seek buy-in from your team and stakeholders.
 * You will work excellently with your engineering and design colleagues. You have a sufficient grasp of the best practices of these disciplines, and our implementations-that you can usually sketch coherent high-level solutions to product problems in various relevant software design artefacts which fundamentally stand up to critiques of your counterparts.
 * You will foster a team culture in which feedback is given and received willingly and continually incl. public praise and private, considerate learning opportunities. For you, failure is a shared outcome.
 * You will establish and maintain high-functioning communication channels between your team and all your stakeholder groups to maximise their and your effectiveness. You understand their goals, jobs and pains. You bring in the right people, at the right time, in the right way to topics, and convey complex topics, simply and effectively.
 * You will lead groups of cross-discipline colleagues through complexity and ambiguity to rapidly reach alignment and meaningful decisions.
   
   

Your Profile

Must Haves


 * 3+ years of Product Management experience
 * 6+ years total experience working on/with technology-powered products in either product or product-adjacent areas (e.g. development, operations, design)
 * Experience leading a cross-functional team of engineers
   
   

Preferred Experience


 * Built B2C experiences in e-commerce, marketplaces, or subscription businesses
 * Familiar with onboarding, funnel, catalog, or configuration flows
 * Experience improving customer conversion or driving product-led growth
 * Exposure to distributed systems or microservice-based platforms
   
   

Important Attributes For This Role


 * You are detail-oriented, analytical in nature (ideally with a bachelor degree, or previous experience in an analytical discipline)
 * You are organised and multi-threaded; happy moving multiple topics forward in parallel.
 * Interested in learning the fintech domain-no prior experience required
   
   

About Us

Raisin is the trailblazer in the savings and investment space. Founded in 2012, the fintech company started by opening the $95+ trillion deposits and investments market of the European Union, the United Kingdom and the United States to consumers.

Today, Raisin serves more than one million customers in these three markets, offering savings products as well as investment and pension products. This makes the Berlin-based fintech one of the leading global savings and investments marketplaces. Savers get a wider choice of attractive products with the ability to move their money freely. In addition, financial service providers get best-in-class marketplace solutions for their customers, and banks get better access to retail funding.

Raisin operates its own B2C marketplaces in Europe and the U.S. In Germany, the company offers ETF-based investment and retirement products in addition to savings products. Raisin works with over 400 banks and financial service providers from over 30 countries

We are backed by renowned international investors such as b2venture, Deutsche Bank, Goldman Sachs, Greycroft, Headline, Index Ventures, Latitude Ventures, Orange Ventures, PayPal Ventures, Top Tier Capital Partners, Ribbit Capital, Vitruvian Partners and M&G.

At Raisin, we care about each other and it is one of our top priorities to foster an open and caring environment in which everyone feels welcome and comfortable. Our culture is strongly driven by our ambitious team, which connects more than 75 different nationalities.

In total, we have 8 offices across the world: Berlin, Frankfurt, Hamburg, Madrid, Manchester, Munich, New York and Salt Lake City.

We also think it’s important to take the time to celebrate our hard work and achievements together, with events like our yearly summer and winter party, as well as a couple of smaller get-togethers.

We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, or gender identity.

title: Business Analyst-Germany
description:
职位描述

1、深度洞察商业与行业发展趋势，制定欧洲本对本业务品类采购策略。分析市场趋势，包括客户需求、标准、供应商、销售渠道趋势、竞争对手、定价等；

2、创新设计定义行业产品形态及方案，完成包括但不限于商业产品、中台策略产品、行业频道、搜推导购链路等设计，推动行业垂直化建设；

3、与多个合作团队深度协同，负责项目进度把控和资源协调，共创联合解决方案，带动本地供给整体生态繁荣。




1、Deeply understand commercial and industry development trends, formulate B2B business category procurement strategies for Europe, and analyze market trends including customer demands, standards, supplier dynamics, sales channel trends, competitors, and pricing strategies.

2、Innovatively define industry product forms and solutions, including but not limited to commercial products, central platform strategy products, industry-specific channels, and search/recommendation-driven shopping journeys, to drive vertical industry development.

3、Collaborate deeply with cross-functional teams, oversee project timelines and resource coordination, co-create joint solutions, and drive the growth of the local supply ecosystem.

职位要求

1、5年以上工作经验，有行业及跨境电商专业经验，熟悉市场动态，了解市场需求；

2、熟悉互联网产品导流体系，对数据敏感，擅长数据化运营，有较强的数据分析能力和逻辑思考能力，能够系统分析问题，解决问题；

3、有一定的商业判断力和务实的交付成果的方法，能聚合内部和生态资源，达成业务目标；

4、有熟练的英语听说读写能力或海外工作经验者优先。




1、Minimum 5 years of professional experience in industry and cross-border e-commerce, with a strong understanding of market dynamics and demand.

2、Familiarity with internet product traffic-driving systems, highly data-sensitive, and skilled in data-driven operations. Requires strong analytical and logical thinking skills to systematically solve problems.

3、Proven business acumen and pragmatic approaches to deliver results, with the ability to aggregate internal and ecosystem resources to achieve business goals.

4、Fluent English proficiency (written and verbal) or overseas work experience is preferred.
sector: Software Development and Wholesale Import and Export

title: Working Student or Intern (all genders) in  Business Analyst Relationship Management Team
description:
Working Student or Intern (all genders) in Business Analyst Relationship Management Team

In Frankfurt we are looking for you to join us in a full-time or part-time, non-permanent position starting as soon as possible as Working Student or Intern (all genders) in Business Analyst Relationship Management Team at BNP Paribas Securities Services

Securities Services – Who We Are

BNP Paribas Securities Services is a multi-asset servicing specialist providing cross-border securities servicing solutions including custody and the full services scope for the funds industry serving institutional clients.

BNP Paribas

At BNP Paribas, everyone is on first-name terms, and we wear the clothes we feel good in. We live diversity, team spirit and sustainability. At BNP Paribas, you will find a secure job, plenty of space for your ideas and a suitable professional solution for your individual life situation. We are: The Bank for a Changing World. We - that's around 178,000 employees in 64 countries.

Tasks & Responsibilities: What awaits you


 * Assisting the Relationship Management team in creating and updating client profiles according to global standards
 * Ensuring organized client and internal folders for clear communication and easy information access
 * Developing an overview of procedure filing and related updates
 * Reviewing and acting on all audit actions clearly
 * Supporting product sales campaigns by logging actions and follow-ups
 * Initiating, implementing, and managing cross-team efficiency projects
 * Utilizing our CRM tool and developing team KPIs
 * Providing comprehensive support throughout sales processes
 * Conducting data analysis and preparing results in presentations for senior management
 * Assisting the Relationship Managers in the RFP/RFI process for new mandates (client questionnaires and pitch book preparation in ppt.)
 * Supporting onboarding coordination for new clients
 * Coordinating cross-team efficiency initiatives
 * Maintaining executive sponsor documentation
   
   

Expertise & Soft Skills: What you offer


 * Currently studying business or a related field
 * Experience in the Financial Services Industry
 * Proficient in standard software applications (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, etc.)
 * A proactive team player who is self-motivated
 * Strong communication skills with the ability to convey ideas clearly and concisely
 * Organized and methodical working style
 * Fluent in German and English (C1 Level required)
   
   

You don’t meet every criterion? No problem, you are more than welcome to apply anyway. It is important for us that you can develop and grow in this position.

Diversity is a strength for us. We are convinced of the numerous advantages of diverse perspectives, experiences and competencies. Our aim is therefore to select candidates in an unbiasedly and open-mindedly: Your CV should contain information on your education and work experience - that's all we need. You can find out more about our D&I commitment here.

Benefits: What we offer you


 * Work in the office and from home
 * A wide range of opportunities for your development, such as internal and external training, talent development programmes and (inter)national career prospects within the BNP Paribas Group
 * Employee Assistance Program: Professional support and great offers for your private and family life from benefitatwork and voiio
 * A wide range of offers for your health, such as access to over 6,000 sports and health facilities with EGYM Wellpass
   
   

Do you want to shape a changing world?

Apply now, in only 5 minutes.

Please send us your application documents exclusively via our online portal. Unfortunately, we cannot consider applications by email or on paper for the protection of your data.

Your contact person is Anna Streck – we are on first-name terms.

If you have any questions, please send an email to recruiting.germany@bnpparibas.com

title: Scientific Business Analyst- Frankfurt, Germany
description:
Who We Are

TetraScience is the Scientific Data and AI company. We are catalyzing the Scientific AI revolution by designing and industrializing AI-native scientific data sets, which we bring to life in a growing suite of next gen lab data management solutions, scientific use cases, and AI-enabled outcomes.

TetraScience is the category leader in this vital new market, generating more revenue than all other companies in the aggregate. In the last year alone, the world's dominant players in compute, cloud, data, and AI infrastructure have converged on TetraScience as the de facto standard, entering into co-innovation and go-to-market partnerships: Latest News and Announcements | TetraScience Newsroom:

In connection with your candidacy, you will be asked to carefully review the Tetra Way letter, authored directly by Patrick Grady, our co-founder and CEO. This letter is designed to assist you in better understanding whether TetraScience is the right fit for you from a values and ethos perspective.

It is impossible to overstate the importance of this document and you are encouraged to take it literally and reflect on whether you are aligned with our unique approach to company and team building. If you join us, you will be expected to embody its contents each day.

Who You Are

You are a strategic, analytically minded professional with a passion for bridging scientific insights and cutting-edge technology. You thrive in environments where you can collaborate with scientists, product managers, and engineers to transform complex scientific data into actionable outcomes.

With deep domain knowledge in drug discovery/preclinical development, CMC, or Quality, you are skilled at uncovering innovative use cases that drive AI and machine learning applications. Your ability to engage with scientists and business leaders alike makes you a key player in maximizing the value of scientific data.

You will need to be a high clock speed and forward-thinking individual with a passion for developing requirements for complex solutions targeted to R&D and Quality personas inside of Life Sciences.

You will need to be a high clock-speed, forward-thinking individual with a passion for developing requirements for complex solutions targeted to R&D and Quality personas inside Life Sciences. You embody extreme ownership and have a demonstrated history of deriving maximum value from data through enrichment, analysis, and integration with AI and machine learning applications.

You should also be energized by regularly working onsite with customers. You thrive in dynamic, high-impact, face-to-face collaborative environments where you can build deep relationships and drive scientific transformation firsthand.

Requirements

What You Have Done


 * PhD with 15+ years of industry experience in life sciences, preferably across pharma, biotech, or health tech, with deep domain expertise in discovery, preclinical, CMC, and/or Quality
 * Extensive hands-on experience or direct oversight in one or more of the following areas: high throughput screening, preclinical toxicology, materials engineering, analytical development, drug substance (DS) synthesis and manufacturing
 * Delivered requirements for AI/ML-driven solutions in operational or productized environments that improved efficiency, reduced cost, and enhanced data utilization
 * Extensive hands-on experience with scientific data workflows and lab automation; exposure to FAIR principles and modern data architecture is a plus
 * Strong coding or scripting background (e.g., Python, Nextflow, AWS, SDKs) and familiarity with scientific tools, databases, and ontologies is preferred
 * Exceptional communication and storytelling ability to engage technical and executive stakeholders
 * Prior experience in customer-facing, consulting, or commercial-scientific interface roles
   
   

What You Will Do


 * You will be a critical team member in a unique partnership to industrialize Scientific AI. As such, you will engage directly with customers onsite up to 4-5 days per week in the Frankfurt Region.
 * Customer Data Exploration: Investigate diverse customer datasets, identifying enrichment and AI-readiness opportunities
 * Scientific Use Case Development: Collaborate with customers to define, iterate, and implement innovative scientific AI/ML use cases
 * Stakeholder Engagement: Conduct onsite interviews and workshops to deeply understand customer challenges and data landscapes
 * Data Analysis and Enrichment: Perform exploratory data analysis and define transformation workflows that enable scientific AI
 * Workflow Documentation: Develop visual documentation including workflow diagrams, ERDs, and ontology definitions
 * AI Model Evaluation: Provide practical scientific input on model output, with suggestions to improve real-world performance
 * Customer Enablement: Deliver onsite demonstrations, conduct working sessions, and act as a trusted advisor in AI adoption
 * Strategic Insight: Propose new directions, experiments, or platforms that can amplify scientific discovery and development
   
   

Benefits


 * Competitive Salary and equity in a fast-growing company
 * Supportive, team-oriented culture of continuous improvement
 * Generous paid time off (PTO)
 * Remote working opportunities, when not at customer sites

title: Master Data and Content Ecosystem Business Analyst
description:
ABB auttaa teollisuuden eri toimialoja toimimaan korkealla suorituskyvyllä ja lisäämään samalla toimintansa tehokkuutta, tuottavuutta ja kestävyyttä niin, että ne menestyvät paremmin. Odotamme edistymistä – niin sinulta, tiimiltäsi kuin koko maailmaltakin. Maailmanlaajuisena markkinajohtajana annamme sinulle tarvittavat välineet tämän saavuttamiseksi. Kasvu vaatii sitkeyttä, eikä se aina ole helppoa. Mutta ABB:llä me teemme töitä yhdessä. Run what runs the world.

Tämä Positio Raportoi

Digital Content Global Leader

The MD&C Ecosystem Business Analyst is responsible for bridging business needs and technical solutions across the organization's master data landscape. This role involves analyzing, designing, and optimizing the flow of master data (e.g., Product, Customer, Supplier, Material, Financial Data) across various systems, including ERP, PIM, DAM, CRM, MDM, BI etc. platforms.

Location: European time zone

Work model: hybrid

Key Responsibilities


 * Engage with business units to understand their master data and content requirements.
 * Document current-state processes and identify opportunities for process improvements.
 * Translate business requirements into functional specifications for system enhancements.
 * Act as a subject matter expert in master data and content projects.
 * Contribute to data governance frameworks and support data quality initiatives.
 * Serve as a key contact point between business teams and IT regarding master data ecosystem topics.
   
   

Our Team Dynamics

Our teams support each other, collaborate, and never stop learning. Everyone brings something unique, and together we push ideas forward to solve real problems. Being part of our team means your work matters - because the progress we make here creates real impact out there.

Key Qualifications & Experience


 * Bachelor's degree or extensive experience in Business Informatics, Information Systems, Business Administration, Data Science, or a related field.
 * At least 10 years of experience as a Business Analyst, Data Analyst, or similar role, with a focus on master data.
 * Strong understanding of product master data domain and experience working in multi-system environments.
 * Good understanding of data structures, data modeling, and database principles.
 * Strong analytical and communication skills.
   
   

What’s in it for you?

We empower you to take the lead, share bold ideas, and shape real outcomes. You’ll grow through hands-on experience, mentorship, and learning that fits your goals. Here, your work doesn’t just matter, it moves things forward

More About Us

ABB Smart Power provides energy distribution solutions for data centers, industrial and manufacturing plants, critical infrastructure and commercial buildings. The Division’s technical teams work closely with industry partners, delivering advanced solutions that support rapid growth, energy transition, and sustainability objectives. The Division’s portfolio includes industrial circuit breakers, low-voltage systems, motor starting applications, and safety devices like switches and relays. Its Power Protection unit supports the world’s largest data center companies with advanced energy-efficient UPS solutions. The Division’s ABB Ability™ Energy Manager provides a scalable, easy-to-use platform that helps organizations save energy and reduce CO2 emissions.

Call to Action

Guide the future. This is where innovation accelerates, industries are reimagined, and your impact powers the world ahead. Run What Runs the World.

#ABBCareers

#RunwithABB

#Runwhatrunstheworld

#Agile

title: Key Account Manager – DACH
description:

 * Monitor competitor activity and market trends across Germany, Austria, and Switzerland.

title: Key Account Manager
description:
Crinetics is a pharmaceutical company with global headquarters based in San Diego, California, with a Country Office in Munich, Germany. Crinetics develops much-needed therapies for people with endocrine diseases and endocrine-related tumors. We were founded by a dedicated team of scientists with the simple belief that better therapies developed from rigorous innovation can lead to better lives. Our work continues to make a real difference in the lives of patients. We have a prolific discovery engine and a robust preclinical and clinical development pipeline. We are driven by science with a patient-centric and team-oriented culture. Crinetics is known for its inclusive workplace culture. This is an exciting time to join Crinetics as we expand our operations in Europe and shape our organization into the world’s premier fully-integrated endocrine company from discovery to patients. Join our team as we transform the lives of others.




Position Summary:




The Key Account Manager (KAM) will generate sales of Crinetics products within the defined territory to a level that meets and/or exceeds objectives through effective and persuasive execution of the marketing plan, with a primary focus on maximizing product sales by effectively communicating the value proposition of the Endocrinology portfolio to relevant stakeholders. This role is responsible for targeting and promoting Crinetics' therapeutic products to endocrinologists, and other healthcare providers, with the goal of driving business growth and achieving the company's objectives.




Manages time and territory to ensure maximum results. Stays current on Crinetics and competitive product information to be a valuable resource to our customers. The Key Account Manager will analyze the available territory data to identify opportunities. Communicates routinely with peers, management and marketing concerning opportunities and recommendations to increase market share and sales. Closely follows all applicable laws and regulations that govern Crinetics and the pharmaceutical industry.







Essential Job Functions and Responsibilities:

These may include but are not limited to:

 * Attain or exceed assigned sales and profit goals.
 * Develop and execute a strategic business / account plan for a wide geographical area to effectively target, penetrate, and establish a network of relationships with key decision makers and stakeholders.
 * Develop and analyze territory reports to identify opportunities to increase sales of Crinetics’ products. Implement plans to address opportunities.
 * Deliver the product messages in an accurate and persuasive manner that is consistent with the marketing plan and results in utilization of Crinetics’ products.
 * Effectively call on physicians, endocrine nurses, physician assistants, pharmacists, etc., across multiple medical subspecialties.
 * Continually update knowledge of Crinetics and competitive products to act as a resource to customers.
 * Complete administrative duties as required in an accurate and timely manner. Stay within expense guidelines & assigned budgets.
 * Adhere to all applicable laws and regulations that govern Crinetics and the pharmaceutical industry.
 * Other duties as assigned.




Education and Experience:

Required:

 * Bachelor’s degree with at least 8 years of Pharmaceutical, Medical Device or Healthcare Industry sales experience
 * Ability to work independently and manage key account relationships
 * Demonstrated growth in sales while managing your own territory
 * Documented track record of consistently meeting or exceeding sales goals
 * Experience working with Marketing, Commercial Operations, Market Access, Medical Affairs, and other cross-functional teams to achieve shared goals and objectives.
 * Business acumen and strong comprehension of difficult clinical information
 * Ability to articulate complex clinical messages to Healthcare Providers in real time situations
 * The ability to independently manage multiple deliverables and adapt to shifting priorities with strong skills in project management, collaboration and communication will be key to success.
 * Excellent organization and time management skills
 * Outstanding oral and written communication skills
 * Strong interpersonal and virtual engagement skills
 * Independent, with an ability to work within a team
 * Attention to detail and follow-through
 * Proficient in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PPT, etc.)
 * Excellent command of German and English
 * Endocrinology Experience is preferred




Travel:

You may be required to travel for up to 70% of your time.







Equal Opportunity Employer:

Crinetics is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. We provide equal employment opportunities to all employees and employment applicants without regard to unlawful considerations of sex, sexual orientation, gender (including gender identity and/or expression), pregnancy, race, color, creed, national or ethnic origin, citizenship status, religion or similar philosophical beliefs, disability, marital and civil union status, age, genetic information, veteran status or any personal attribute or characteristic that is protected by applicable local, state or federal laws in the countries in which we operate globally.

title: Key Account Manager Machine Distributor DACH
description:
Topcon Positioning Group is headquartered in Livermore, California, USA (topconpositioning.com). We design, manufacture and distribute productivity tools for developing a brighter future. Whether cultivating the earth or building upon it, Topcon brings innovation in workflow automation and seamless connectivity of data to construction, geopositioning and agriculture industries focused on developing a sustainable tomorrow.

Learn more about working with us at topconcareers.com

Topcon Positioning is looking for a motivated and committed

Key Account Manager Machine Distributor DACH region

Workplace: Remote ( Germany )

Job Purpose

The Key Account Manager Machine Distributor DACH will be responsible for accomplishing the development of Machine Distributor and to seek out new partnerships across the own dedicated region (Germany, Austria, Switzerland). This KAM-role will be part of the regional sales Team, reporting to the Head of the region

Key Responsibilities

Account Relationship Management


 * Develop and maintain strong, long-term relationships with key machine distributors.
 * Act as the main point of contact for all distributor-related business matters.
 * Conduct regular business reviews and strategic planning sessions with distributors.
   
   

Sales & Revenue Growth


 * Drive sales growth through distributor channels by setting and tracking sales targets.
 * Identify new business opportunities within assigned accounts or regions.
 * Collaborate with internal sales and product teams to develop tailored solutions for distributors.
   
   

Business Planning & Forecasting


 * Create joint business plans with distributors including sales forecasts, marketing activities, and growth initiatives.
 * Monitor distributor performance against targets and KPIs
 * Provide accurate sales forecasts and pipeline reports to senior management.
 * Distributor Development & Support
 * Support distributors with training, product information, and marketing tools.
 * Help distributors develop their own capabilities in sales, Application, and customer engagement.
 * Resolve issues related to pricing, inventory, logistics, and customer service in coordination with internal teams.
 * Market Approch & Strategy
 * Gather and report market intelligence from the field regarding competitors, trends, and customer feedback.
 * Analyze data to identify opportunities and threats in the market.
 * Contribute to strategy development for product positioning and distribution optimization.
   
   

Cross-functional Collaboration


 * Work closely with marketing, finance, logistics, technical service, and product management teams to align goals and execution.
 * Ensure smooth execution of promotional campaigns and new product introductions through distributors.
   
   

Compliance & Contract Management


 * Ensure distributor activities comply with contractual obligations, company policies, and legal regulations.
 * Negotiate commercial agreements and renewals, ensuring mu-tual profitability.
 * Identify local/regional Machine Distributor together with the Business Planning division: in particular Hitachi & Volvo brands
 * Negotiate all distribution contracts
 * Identify the needs of the machinery distributors
 * Lead and inform our partners or subsidiaries, put in place an operational strategy.
 * Manage and develop the tools and services for the animation of Machinery distributors sales
 * Deploy the sales strategy to increase turnover and margin
 * Analyze company performance and define action plans
 * Teamwork with our subsidiaries and partners
 * Interacting with Key account Construction contractors Team and Major regional Accounts
 * Monitor sales activity against budget
 * Provide sales forecasting and progress reports
 * Lead pilot project
   
   

Minimum Job Requirements

Education and Experience


 * Serval years of working experience in a similar position
 * Professional background in sales
 * Excellent communication skills in English, written and verbal
 * Well-organized, accurate and thorough work, self-directed team player
 * Willingness to travel across DACH region approximately 60% of the working time
   
   

Knowledge, Skills, And Attributes


 * Demonstrated ability to think strategically, analytically, as well as creative problem-solving skills
 * Well-developed listening skills and a strong ability to engage at a variety of levels.
 * Understands to prioritize for project completion and monitoring progress.
 * Ability to work in a team environment that promotes collaboration
 * Solid knowledge and experience in applying strategy to the market
 * Advaced skills in powerpoint is a ‘must have’
   
   

Ready to take the next step in your career?

We’d love to hear from you! Please send us your application, including your earliest date you could join our team.

For further information, please contact our Corporate Senior Recruiter TOPCON Europe Mr. Simone Masseroni by mailing smasseroni@topcon.com

title: Key Account Manager, Uber for Business Germany
description:
Join Uber for Business as a Key Account Manager to manage and grow a portfolio of top-tier, high-growth clients. You'll own client relationships post-sale, driving revenue through upselling and cross-selling Uber's solutions. Your expertise will help you consult clients, recommend strategies, and build strong partnerships that fuel mutual growth.

What You'll Do


 * Lead successful launches with Implementation teams for key accounts
 * Expand and retain your book of business by building strong client relationships and exceeding sales targets
 * Collaborate cross-functionally to enhance account lifecycle efficiency
 * Identify new growth opportunities through insights from customer feedback and data
 * Recommend improvements to Product, Sales, Marketing, and Support for a better client experience
 * Continuously improve playbooks, tools, and processes for operational excellence
 * Conduct regular business reviews with clients to optimize Uber for Business usage
   
   

What You Bring


 * 4+ years' experience in client-facing roles with revenue targets
 * Excellent communication and interpersonal skills in German and English
 * Proven success in account growth and sales strategy execution
 * Strong data-driven decision-making skills
 * Highly organized with excellent project and time management
 * Thrives in fast-paced, competitive environments

title: Key Account Manager, Germany
description:
About SiTime

SiTime Corporation is the precision timing company. Our semiconductor MEMS programmable solutions offer a rich feature set that enables customers to differentiate their products with higher performance, smaller size, lower power and better reliability. With more than 3 billion devices shipped, SiTime is changing the timing industry. For more information, visit www.sitime.com .

Job Summary

This is a full-time role for an Account Manager, responsible for driving sales to grow SiTime’s revenue in the DACH region. Success in this role will require proactively managing commercial activities to win new projects within existing Strategic and Focus accounts and developing relationships with new key customers.

The Account Manager will play a leading role in expanding market share across various segments, including Industrial and Aerospace & Defense, with a specific emphasis on the Automotive market. To achieve rapid growth, the candidate will leverage a broad range of resources within SiTime and work closely with local distributors.

In addition, the Account Manager should have a solid understanding of the semiconductor industry and the ability to effectively promote SiTime’s innovative MEMS timing products. This includes comprehending customers' timing design challenges and articulating SiTime’s unique solutions to address those needs. It is not necessary to meet all job requirements to be a qualified candidate for the position.

Responsibilities


 * Drive Sales Growth by accelerate sales revenue within the automotive and assigned account customer base, focusing on meeting and exceeding sales targets in the region.
 * Manage identified key accounts within the territory, fostering relationships to enhance sales growth and client retention.
 * Present product offerings and services to purchasing teams, engineers, and management at strategic accounts with a polished, professional approach to support account growth.
 * Serve as the primary point of contact for customer support on commercial topics, including handling PPAPs (Production Part Approval Process), RFQs (Requests for Quotation), and other inquiries.
 * Lead and participate in annual supplier negotiations to ensure alignment with customer and company goals.
 * Provide market intelligence and competitive feedback to the company, offering insights on competitor moves and suggesting new product ideas or enhancements based on customer needs.
 * Maintain and update customer data in the CRM (Salesforce) accurately, tracking sales opportunities, design-ins, design wins, and production status to support the sales pipeline.
 * Prepare and provide precise business forecasts for use in capacity planning, resource allocation, and sales strategy prioritization.
 * Collaborate with internal resources, including engineers and management, to ensure customer requirements are met and to enhance overall account satisfaction.
   
   

Qualifications & Requirements (Education Must Be Included)


 * Sales, Account Management, and Customer Relationship Management skills.
 * Knowledge of the automotive industry.
 * Excellent communication and negotiation skills.
 * Strong problem-solving and analytical abilities.
 * Fluency in German for the DACH region.
 * Experience with semiconductor with analog or timing products is a plus.
 * Master degree in Engineering required
   
   

Desired Characteristics & Attributes


 * Hunter mentality to generate new business opportunities
 * Ability to work independently and remotely.
   
   

The actual wage offered may vary depending on work location, experience, education, training, external market data, internal pay equity, or other bona fide factors.

SiTime compensation packages includes base salary, bonus based on achieving your innovation goals and equity.

Learn More about SiTime: Review the Get to Know SiTime section of our career page to explore our culture, values, and what makes us unique.


 * Innovation on Top – Philosophies of Innovation with Rajesh Vashist
 * Fabrication Knowledge – An Interview with Rajesh Vashist
 * SiTime Corporation – YouTube

title: Key Account Manager Leasing (d/f/m)
description:
Founded in 1996, mobile.de disrupted the status quo of buying and selling cars as the first online vehicle marketplace.

Today, we are Germany's largest vehicle marketplace with around 1.4 million listed cars, commercial vehicles, motorcycles and e-bikes. Both private customers and more than 40,000 registered vehicle dealers use the platform and benefit from 108 million customer visits per month. As a “one-stop shop”, mobile.de's offering includes financing and leasing solutions in addition to buying and selling - and we will not stop innovating. If you are driven by an eagerness to learn and a passion for collaboration then we should get to know each other.

mobile.de is an equal opportunity employer and we value diversity. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, colour, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status or disability status.

If you feel like you don’t meet all of the requirements for this role but are interested, please consider applying anyway. We strongly encourage people from historically excluded groups to apply.

What We Offer

Meaningful Work: We are a diverse, international, highly skilled and passionate team committed to a world where people share more and waste less. Every day you will have the opportunity to make a huge difference for our users, customers as well as shape the future.

Embracing AI: We're at the forefront of integrating cutting-edge AI technologies into our operations. Being part of mobile.de you will work with and learn about AI tools, contributing to projects that leverage AI to enhance efficiency, improve customer experiences, and drive our mission forward. With an AI-first mindset, we foster a culture of continuous learning and experimentation, empowering our team to explore and apply AI in meaningful ways for the company and themselves.

Growth and Development: We are a global organisation who truly believes in growing our people. To support this we offer lots of development and training opportunities and provide a budget for our team members.

Connection and Inclusion: Our culture is the glue that holds us together. We believe in making meaningful connections and creating an inclusive atmosphere with lots of opportunities to connect both in your day to day work and through social team activities (online and offline).

What You’ll Do & Who You Are

To strengthen our team, we are looking for a dedicated Key Account Manager (d/f/m) Leasing to further develop our leasing sales.

About The Role

As a Key Account Manager Leasing, you will focus on developing sustainable relationships with Germany’s largest dealer groups. Your primary objective will be to drive leasing-specific upselling and cross-selling, growing our influence and market share. You will serve as the voice of the leasing customer, relaying their needs and insights to our internal teams to enhance our offerings. This role reports to the Regional Manager West.

What You'll Do


 * Inspire large dealer groups with a consultative approach to our leasing solutions, positioning our product range as an optimal fit for their leasing needs.
 * Be a strategic partner for major dealer groups in leasing, nurturing long-term account relationships.
 * Establish a sustainable network up to C-level within the leasing sector to achieve medium- and long-term leasing goals.
 * Analyze important leasing performance metrics and develop relevant strategies to ensure sales and corporate leasing goals are met.
 * Monitor leasing market trends and developments, identifying new customer potentials and promising growth opportunities.
 * Translate customer needs and leasing market demands into product recommendations for future development.
   
   

Who You Are


 * 2+ years of experience in car sales or key account sales with a customer-focused approach.
 * Strong analytical skills with the ability to convert leasing data into actionable insights.
 * Excellent communication, presentation, and negotiation skills
 * (Business) Fluent (C1/C2) in German with a good level of English.
 * A strategic thinker with a results-oriented mindset, thriving in Sales environments.
 * A passion for delivering outstanding leasing-focused client experiences.
 * Willingness to travel across Germany.
   
   

Benefits

Working at mobile.de comes with its perks! Enjoy the following benefits:


 * Recharge with 28 days of paid time off.
 * Stay mobile with a €50 monthly transportation/mobility allowance.
 * Keep growing with a development budget and access to coaching.
 * Family first - enjoy up to 12 (non-birth parent) or 20 (birth parent) weeks of fully paid parental leave.
 * Learn anytime, anywhere with our online and offline library.
 * Get rewarded with an attractive base salary and participation in our annual incentive plans.
 * Work from anywhere - up to 20 days per year from wherever you feel most productive.
 * Prioritize your well-being with a 24/7 Employee Assistance Programme for you and your immediate family.

About SiTime

SiTime Corporation is the precision timing company. Job Summary

This is a full-time role for an Account Manager, responsible for driving sales to grow SiTime’s revenue in the DACH region. SiTime participates in the E-Verify program.

title: Key Account Manager (m/f/d) - North-West Germany
description:
Sirtex Medical is a global healthcare business with offices in Boston, Sydney, Germany, and

Singapore, working to improve outcomes in people with cancer. Our current lead product is a

targeted radiation therapy for liver cancer called SIR‐Spheres® Y‐90 resin microspheres. More than 100,000 doses have been supplied to treat patients with liver cancer at more than 1,300 medical centers in over 50 countries.



At Sirtex, we’re transforming our industry through our leadership with interventional oncology

and being a values‐led company. To do this, we empower our people to realize their potential

through life‐changing work. We offer stimulating careers and development, encourage

innovation, and strive for excellence in everything we do. We will always foster a diverse and

inclusive workplace, in which our global teams are united by an unwavering commitment to

improve the quality and longevity of patients’ lives by providing innovative interventional

oncology solutions.



Here, you will be a vital contributor to our inspiring and bold mission.





Job Description



The Key Account Manager (m/f/d) – North-West Germany (Lower Saxony, Bremen, Northrine-Westfalia, Rhineland-Pfalz and Saarland) is the main interface between Sirtex and its customers. The KAM’s primary function is to help Sirtex achieve its sales objectives by prospecting and initiating qualified new accounts and servicing existing accounts.The KAM is responsible for all aspects of account management, including but not limited to; accounts receivable where payment problems are encountered, training, problem solving, and assisting the account on any and all needs. The KAM has ultimate responsibility to drive key accounts on the assigned territory. The main focuses are market development within a multidisciplinary environment including Digestive Oncology, Hepatology, Surgical Oncology, Interventional Radiology, Nuclear Medicine as well as SIR-Spheres user physicians to assist, train and serve in line with SIRTEX policy and requirements. This position also helps Sirtex achieve its regulatory requirements by conveying customer needs and requirements and reporting any incidents or product complaints.



 * Develop an understanding of the unique market and implement account plans for key accounts and partners to generate strategic relationships that will result in sales within assigned territory
 * Deliver selling presentations promoting Sirtex Products – including on site product demonstrations- to targeted physician groups and other health care professionals (interventional radiologists, nuclear medicine practitioners, oncologists, hepatologists and liver surgeons)
 * Develop relationships in all areas of the hospital and surrounding referral area that are key elements to Sirtex’s success
 * Organize peer-to-peer educational meetings and trainings to educate-influence multidisciplinary health care professionals to use the product
 * Positively influence clinicians, key opinion leaders/influencers and other multidisciplinary stakeholders to generate or increase product awareness, uptake and use
 * Understand, interpret and promote relevant clinical data to support the uptake and use of the product amongst multidisciplinary hospital specialists
 * Continuously educate oneself on latest information related to disease states and the everchanging business environment
 * Participate in national and international congresses and organization of local medical educational events
 * Support and assist, where appropriate, third party business partners engaged in clinical trial or other programs
 * Have a clear understanding of health/product reimbursement related to Sirtex
 * Understanding of the reimbursement and funding structure and process for medical devices/pharmaceuticals in Germany
   
   

Qualifications


 * Bachelor’s degree or equivalent degree (Pharmacology, Nursing, Business Administration, other related)
 * Minimum 5 years of experience on the medical sales field in the pharmaceutical, biotech or medical devices industries; of which at least 2 years have been exclusively in a specialized hospital environment targeting consultants
 * Extensive knowledge and experience in medical processes in oncology, gastroenterology or hepatology are essential
 * Good existing relationships with GI oncologists, gastroenterologists, hepatologists and liver surgeons would be beneficial
 * Proven track record of successful funding negotiations in Germany at the hospital level.
 * Experience of strategic selling with high value products
 * Experience of key opinion leader development
 * Good communication skills and a straight service-, success- and sales-oriented mentality with a desire for continuous improvement
 * Strong team player with good interpersonal skills
 * Hunter mentality and a solution-oriented approach
 * Demonstration of initiative, creativity and resourcefulness
 * Intermediate to advanced skills in Microsoft Office
 * Native speaker in German
 * Advanced level of English language (written and spoken)
 * Must reside in and be able to travel within the territory of scope, ideal residence Cologne/ Dortmund/ Dusseldorf area
   
   

Additional Information



All your information will be kept confidential according to EEO guidelines.



Do you want to be part of something bigger? A team whose impact stretches across the globe making a real difference to the quality of people’s lives. Sirtex recognizes that well-being, financial health, and work-life balance are crucial for our employees to achieve personal success.



Sirtex offers qualified candidates:



 * Diverse and flexible work arrangements to achieve the optimum balance between work and personal responsibilities.
 * A culture of respect, diversity, collaboration, and innovation fostering inclusiveness and superior performance.
 * Attractive compensation and benefit packages which are practical, robust and equitable.
 * A commitment to support ongoing professional growth through career development, on the job experiences and training opportunities.
 * Challenging work which supports the development of new and better ways to improve clinical outcomes for oncology treatment around the world.
 * An unwavering commitment to company values, employee safety and excellence in everything we do.

Diversity drives innovation; inclusion fosters belonging, growth and success. Sirtex believes that it takes multiple perspectives and voices to create a culture and workplace which fosters engagement, teamwork, and employee satisfaction to perform our best and deliver on commitments. We are dedicated to fostering an environment where all employees feel valued, included, and can share their ideas so that we can exceed even our own expectations.



Sirtex is An Equal Opportunity/Affirmative Action Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability or veteran status, age or any other characteristic protected under applicable law. Sirtex will make reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with known disabilities, in accordance with applicable law.

title: Master Data and Content Ecosystem Business Analyst
description:
Bei ABB unterstützen wir Industrien dabei, effizienter und nachhaltiger zu werden. Fortschritt ist bei uns keine Option, sondern selbstverständlich – für Sie, Ihr Team und die Welt. Als globaler Marktführer bieten wir Ihnen alles, was Sie brauchen, um diesen Wandel voranzutreiben. Der Weg dorthin ist nicht immer einfach – denn echtes Wachstum erfordert Mut. Aber bei ABB gehen Sie ihn nicht allein. Run what runs the world.

Diese Position Berichtet An

Digital Content Global Leader

The MD&C Ecosystem Business Analyst is responsible for bridging business needs and technical solutions across the organization's master data landscape. This role involves analyzing, designing, and optimizing the flow of master data (e.g., Product, Customer, Supplier, Material, Financial Data) across various systems, including ERP, PIM, DAM, CRM, MDM, BI etc. platforms.

Location: European time zone

Work model: hybrid

Key Responsibilities


 * Engage with business units to understand their master data and content requirements.
 * Document current-state processes and identify opportunities for process improvements.
 * Translate business requirements into functional specifications for system enhancements.
 * Act as a subject matter expert in master data and content projects.
 * Contribute to data governance frameworks and support data quality initiatives.
 * Serve as a key contact point between business teams and IT regarding master data ecosystem topics.
   
   

Our Team Dynamics

Our teams support each other, collaborate, and never stop learning. Everyone brings something unique, and together we push ideas forward to solve real problems. Being part of our team means your work matters - because the progress we make here creates real impact out there.

Key Qualifications & Experience


 * Bachelor's degree or extensive experience in Business Informatics, Information Systems, Business Administration, Data Science, or a related field.
 * At least 10 years of experience as a Business Analyst, Data Analyst, or similar role, with a focus on master data.
 * Strong understanding of product master data domain and experience working in multi-system environments.
 * Good understanding of data structures, data modeling, and database principles.
 * Strong analytical and communication skills.
   
   

What’s in it for you?

We empower you to take the lead, share bold ideas, and shape real outcomes. You’ll grow through hands-on experience, mentorship, and learning that fits your goals. Here, your work doesn’t just matter, it moves things forward

More About Us

ABB Smart Power provides energy distribution solutions for data centers, industrial and manufacturing plants, critical infrastructure and commercial buildings. The Division’s technical teams work closely with industry partners, delivering advanced solutions that support rapid growth, energy transition, and sustainability objectives. The Division’s portfolio includes industrial circuit breakers, low-voltage systems, motor starting applications, and safety devices like switches and relays. Its Power Protection unit supports the world’s largest data center companies with advanced energy-efficient UPS solutions. The Division’s ABB Ability™ Energy Manager provides a scalable, easy-to-use platform that helps organizations save energy and reduce CO2 emissions.

Call to Action

Guide the future. This is where innovation accelerates, industries are reimagined, and your impact powers the world ahead. Run What Runs the World.

#ABBCareers

#RunwithABB

#Runwhatrunstheworld

#Agile

Wir schätzen Menschen mit unterschiedlichem persönlichem Hintergrund. Könnte das hier Teil Ihrer Geschichte werden? Bewerben Sie sich noch heute oder besuchen Sie www.abb.com, um mehr über uns zu erfahren und sich über die Wirkung, die unsere Industrielösungen auf der ganzen Welt haben, zu informieren.

JR00009561

title: Key Account Manager
description:
Job Description

What you’ll do

As a Key Account Manager for the DACH region, you will be responsible for managing and growing relationships with key business clients, distributors, and partners across Germany, Austria, and Switzerland. Your role will focus on driving sales and expanding our presence within the B2B market, ensuring long-term partnerships and business growth. The ideal candidate will have a proven track record in sales within the Consumer Electronics sector and a strong understanding of B2B dynamics, including working with enterprise clients, resellers, and channel partners.

Our success is built on cultivating strong, long-term relationships with our B2B clients, and we are looking for someone who can foster these relationships and deliver growth. You will work closely with internal stakeholders and external partners to develop tailored solutions, optimise sales performance, and achieve business objectives.

How You’ll Do It


 * Develop and maintain strong, long-lasting relationships with key B2B accounts across the DACH region, including corporate clients, distributors, resellers.
 * Drive growth by executing strategic plans, including account planning, forecasting, and tailored sales execution to meet business goals.
 * Identify opportunities for sales growth and lead the execution of targeted business development plans to increase market share in key B2B product categories.
 * Monitor account performance, align with sales targets, and proactively push for overachievement of KPIs to ensure maximum client satisfaction and business outcomes.
 * Develop and implement sales strategies that are aligned with the specific needs of the B2B market across the DACH region.
 * Collaborate with cross-functional teams (e.g., Planning, Operations, and Marketing) to ensure smooth product delivery, optimise inventory levels, and maintain a high level of service to business clients.
 * Use data-driven insights to identify new opportunities for sales growth, risk mitigation, and market expansion.
 * Track industry trends, competitor activity, and customer feedback to recommend opportunities for product development, customization, and new market penetration.
 * Prepare detailed sales reports and forecasts based on data, customer insights, and market analysis to guide strategic decisions.
 * Collaborate with entire sales team including channel support to ensure best practices and information are shared to maximise results and achieve goals
 * Travel regularly to attend trade shows, partner meetings, and customer sites across the DACH region to build relationships, present new solutions, and drive sales opportunities.
 * Champion our products, ensuring that all B2B clients are fully aware of our offerings and how they can benefit from our technology.
 * Be passionate about product; understand and champion Belkin products and categories.
 * Be part of a positive and collaborative high-performance culture, encouraging teamwork, innovation, and professional growth.
 * Understand, communicate, and always uphold Belkin’s company values.
   
   

What You’ll Need


 * Fluent in German, with strong verbal and written communication skills in English.
 * Exceptional interpersonal, communication, and negotiation skills, with a strong focus on building long-term business relationships.
 * Ability to manage multiple priorities, thrive in a fast-paced environment, and maintain attention to detail under pressure.
 * A proactive and solution-oriented mindset, with the ability to think strategically and act decisively.
 * A genuine interest in technology and consumer electronics, with a focus on B2B applications and solutions.
 * Willingness and ability to travel both locally and internationally (when required).
   
   

What You’ve Done


 * 3+ years’ experience in Key account management within a B2B environment
 * Consumer Electronics industry background is advantageous, preferable with experience working with distributors and resellers
 * Proven track record of managing key B2B accounts and delivering measurable results within the DACH region
 * Proven verbal and written communication skills in German and English
 * Experience working with channel partners and handling complex B2B sales processes
   
   

What You’re Getting Into

We’ve got big collaborative spaces for your big ideas, so bring an open mind and leave your suit in the closet. We all are committed to creating unique and rewarding consumer experiences. Everyone is interested in succeeding – for the team, for themselves and for the business. Cross-functionally and across the company, everyone has common goals and aspires to be their best.

You will learn something new or at least look at things differently every day. There are so many smart and creative people around that you’ll be motivated to pursue the ideal.

Team spirit is infectious. Belkin is an extremely open workplace, where communication is essential. Not every idea will be accepted, but you’ll be asked for your point of view. Innovation thrives on multiple and varied levels. At Belkin we challenge conventional wisdom and refuse to accept that something cannot be done.

Belkin is an Equal Opportunity and Affirmative Action Employer Disability and Veterans. We maintain a drug-free workplace.

All candidates applying for a job in the EMEA region, please review the Applicant Privacy notice HERE

Location:

Aschheim,

title: Key Account Manager (m/w/d)
description:
Your mission

As a Key Account Manager for our Office Printing department, you will be responsible for developing and executing a strategic sales plan to drive growth and maximize sales of Office Printing products across selected resellers and end-user markets. This is an exciting opportunity for B2B sales professionals looking to take the next step in their career.




Please note: This is a remote based position, and candidates must be located in the Northern region of Germany, as this is your target-based region with frequent travel within this area.




What you will do:

 * Participate actively in the development of the sales strategy in your region to optimise the go to market strategy
 * Develop sales opportunities with aligned channel partners to identify and qualify new opportunities for growth
 * Develop and maintain business relationships to achieve the maximum potential revenue from the Epson portfolio
 * Define and implement KPI to achieve quarterly targets (dealer contracts, end-user project volume...) for aligned accounts and defined product range
 * Collect sales out data from channel partners to identify key target end users for Epson sales activity
 * Work closely with the EPSON Corporate End-user team to optimise private and public opportunities
 * Contribute to forecasting, major account reviews and account development planning to report progress




What we ask for:

 * Ideally obtained a degree in business, sales, or related discipline
 * Relevant B2B experience working in similar role and similar market
 * Fluent (written & spoken) in German and English is mandatory
 * Proven record of achieving success through the development of profitable sales
 * Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
 * Strong knowledge of Microsoft Office, particularly Excel
 * Proven ability to build and proactively manage relationships over a long term to generate business growth
 * Ability to set priorities and to work to agreed deadlines



We are keen to hear from you even if you do not match all listed requirements, but you identify with our brand and passion for innovation.




What we offer:

Our heritage

We aspire to be an indispensable company, trusted throughout the world for our commitment to openness, customer satisfaction and sustainability. We respect individuality while promoting teamwork, and we are committed to delivering unique value through innovative and creative solutions.



Our commitment to the environment

We all have a role to play in building a better future. For Epson, being a sustainable company means being mindful of every aspect of our organisation – from the smallest lightbulb to the largest factory. It fuels our innovation, drives our growth, motivates our workforce and to contribute to society.



Our people

We believe a healthy culture, strong values, teamwork, and contribution from a diverse range of individuals will help us to strive for excellence.



Our brand

Ranked by Clarivate Analytics as a Top 100 Global Innovator brand for the last seven years running.
sector: Printing Services and Computers and Electronics Manufacturing

title: Key Account Manager Transformers (m/f/d)
description:
The SGB-SMIT Group is a specialized transformer manufacturer with roots in Europe and locations in Europe, Asia and the United States. The focus has always been on the claim of making an active contribution to a sustainable energy future with reliable transformer technology. SGB-SMIT Group transformers are used worldwide in key projects for the energy transition – for example in wind and solar power plants, industrial applications or in the energy infrastructure of urban agglomerations.

As an essential link in the electricity chain – between generation, transmission and distribution – the transformers of the SGB-SMIT Group ensure stable, efficient and secure energy flows. The product portfolio includes power transformers, distribution transformers, cast-resin transformers and special solutions for data centers, industry and e-mobility, among others. This diversity enables individual solutions for a wide range of requirements and applications.

With over 3,500 employees worldwide, SGB-SMIT Group stands for sustainability, quality and innovation. In close cooperation with energy suppliers, industrial customers and infrastructure operators, solutions are developed that are designed for long-term reliability, efficiency and sustainability.

What We Offer 🏝️

At the SGB-SMIT Group, we are motivated by our mission to provide a stable and sustainable energy supply for our customers around the world. Our lean decision-making process keeps us closely connected to our employees and the successes of our company. We value personal relationships among colleagues, fostering a collaborative environment for our sustainable growth:

Our Benefits


 * 30+1 vacation days & special leave (e.g. compensation days or special leave on birthdays)
 * Attractive salary & remuneration packages
 * Company pension scheme and insurance for employees
 * Flexible working hours
 * Various home office options
 * Personal development and training
 * Excellent health management
 * Bicycle leasing & IT hardware leasing
 * Fitness pass in cooperation with Hanse Fit
 * Excellent company restaurant and free drinks (coffee, water)
 * Company-owned parking spaces with charging facilities for e-vehicles
 * Subsidized Germany ticket, RVV ticket
 * Various discounts as part of Benify Benefits (Apple, Nike, Dell, Zalando etc.)
   
   

How You Will Create An Impact 📈


 * Strategy & growth: Developing and implementing a global key account strategy for long-term business development.
 * Relationship management: Establishing and maintaining relationships with VP/C-level decision-makers worldwide as a central point of contact.
 * Revenue & profit responsibility: Achieving growth and profitability targets, identifying cross-selling and up-selling potential.
 * Contract management: Conducting contract and price negotiations and ensuring smooth renewals.
 * Global collaboration: Close coordination with sales, marketing, engineering, and service across all locations.
 * Market & customer analysis: Continuous monitoring of market trends and customer needs, and reporting to management.
   
   

What Are We Looking For 🔎


 * Strategy & market understanding: Experience in global key account management, development of strategies and customer-specific solutions based on market and customer analyses.
 * Relationship management: Establishment and maintenance of VP/C-level contacts, confident expectation management and conflict resolution.
 * Growth & Profitability: Successful in increasing sales, pricing models, and cross-selling/up-selling.
 * Negotiation & Contractual Skills: Routine in complex deals, contract and renewal negotiations, including compliance awareness.
 * Intercultural cooperation: Experience in global teamwork and project management across multiple locations.
 * Analytics & tools: Confident in using CRM, reporting, and analytics tools; creation of forecasts and reports.
 * Communication & languages: Strong presentation and negotiation skills, fluent English (additional languages an advantage).
   
   

If you value a dynamic, growing and intercultural environment and enjoy hands-on work, then become part of the SGB-SMIT Group and transform with us the future of energy. ⚡

We are looking forward to your application! ⚡

The terms used in the text refer to all genders in accordance with the General Equal Treatment Act (AGG).
